title: Per Capita Consumption Index, Iran, 1955/6-1957/8 (World Bank, 1960; 1954/5=100)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 7, page 42) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image. The image was clean and unambiguous throughout. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 7, page 42, source: Economic Bureau, Plan Organization. All figures are index numbers (base 1954/5=100), not absolute quantities. Per source footnote a/: 'Domestic production plus imports minus exports, without allowance for change of stocks. Population increase assumed to be 2.4 per cent per annum.' Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
